3329850.name: Ashley's Adventure - Get a Job or Die Trying
3329850.description:
Ashley's Adventure - Get a Job or Die Trying is an interactive visual novel where you help Ashley, our lazy-crazy protagonist, to reach her new objective in life; abandoning NEET ways and getting a job.

In this epic journey for employment she will meet crazy characters and lots of problems, which you can solve in a multiple-choice style of gameplay, with each option giving new outcomes, some of them bad, some of them good, but all sure to give you an smile.


ASHLEY

Ashley is a NEET totally dependent of her abusive family who, after endless mocking from her sister and mother, decided to embark herself into an epic adventure through the city in the search of a job, so she can show the world that she can be more than just a games-addicted NEET.

In this odyssey she will meet various characters and will get herself into a lot of trouble, maybe even risk her own life as she delves into the big world.

Get a job or die trying!

GAME CHARACTERISTICS:

  • Lots of colourful characters with unique designs.

  • Interactive dialogue options that can shape the story.

  • A comical adventure with a focus on humor and crazy situations.

  • A bizarre story with more than 1.000 scenes.

  • An original soundtrack produced specially for the game.
3329850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
